description: Automated response to AWS cost anomaly detection alerts. Generates per-tenant cost breakdown, notifies account owners, and flags potential runaway resource usage.

steps.name: notify_finops_slack
steps.description: Alert the FinOps/platform team in Slack with cost spike context.

params.message: Cost anomaly detected. AWS spend has deviated significantly from the 7-day average. Investigating per-tenant breakdown. Check AWS Cost Explorer for details.

steps.name: invoke_cost_breakdown_lambda
steps.description: Invoke the metrics aggregation Lambda to generate a per-tenant cost breakdown report.

steps.name: notify_pagerduty
steps.description: Open a P2 PagerDuty ticket for the FinOps team to review.

params.message: AWS cost anomaly detected. Per-tenant breakdown generation triggered. Review Cost Explorer and identify top spenders.

investigation_steps: 1. Open AWS Cost Explorer: group by Service and by Tag (customer_id)
2. Identify the service and time window of the spike
3. Check Lambda invocation counts: unusually high counts may indicate a runaway loop
4. Check Data Transfer Out: may indicate a customer downloading large datasets
5. If Lambda invocations > 10x average: set concurrency limit on suspect function
6. Notify affected tenant account owner with cost breakdown report
7. If daily spend > $500 above forecast: escalate to Engineering Lead
remediation_commands: # Get current day spend by service
aws ce get-cost-and-usage --time-period Start=$(date +%Y-%m-%d),End=$(date -d '+1 day' +%Y-%m-%d) --granularity DAILY --metrics BlendedCost --group-by Type=DIMENSION,Key=SERVICE
